title: The X-Mark Promise
description: On pages 17, 18, this part focuses on vivi’s choice approaches. The Straw Hats make plans to depart while Vivi faces the decision of whether to remain a princess or continue sailing with her friends.
scene: This scene belongs to the Vivi’s Choice Approaches sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Luffy, Vivi, Nami, Usopp, Zoro.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: All enemies of the royal household.

summary: The Straw Hats make plans to depart while Vivi faces the decision of whether to remain a princess or continue sailing with her friends.
